_rolesNote: Branded is a multi-engine fusion archetype centered on Fallen-of-Albaz (and substitutes like Fallen of the White Dragon) + Despia Fusions. The branded-dracotail-bainbridge-2nd fixture pairs it with the Dracotail engine (Dragon/Spellcaster Fusion toolkit). This expertise covers: (a) Fusion core — Fallen of Albaz treatments, Branded spells, Despia enablers; (b) Dracotail engine — Lv4 Dragon/Spellcaster bodies + Fusion spells Rahu/Faimena; (c) Dogmatika enablers — Ecclesia variants, Guiding Ariadne; (d) the specific user-dictated combo plan lines (Arthalion+Dark Dragon+Secreterion+Mululu canonical AND Mirrorjade alt).

goals.name: Arthalion + Dark Dragon + Mululu + Secreterion + 3 trap set
goals.description: The user-dictated 7-piece canonical endboard per branded-dracotail-combo-plan-2026-04-19.md. 4 MZONE fusion/synchro bodies + 3 set traps (2 Dracotail + 1 Branded). Covers all of Flame/Horn/Fallen&Virtuous set + Arthalion+DarkDragon+Mululu+Secreterion face-up.

required.note: Dracotail Arthalion (Lv8 Fusion Dragon via Rahu)
Ecclesia and the Dark Dragon (Lv8 Synchro, returns from banishment at EP)
The Fallen & The Virtuous (set by Albion EP-eff)

goals.name: 4-MZONE tower (no traps)
goals.description: All 4 monster-zone finishers present without the trap set. Strong interruption tower via Dark Dragon quick-eff + Arthalion/Secreterion/Mululu. Fallback when trap-set triggers don't fire or traps are consumed.

goals.name: Mirrorjade + Lubellion (alt line)
goals.description: Alternative Branded-primary endboard: Mirrorjade (Lv8 Fusion, on-GY banish-target) atop Lubellion (Lv8 Fusion, pendulum-like search body). Triggered via Branded Fusion when the opener pivots Branded-heavy rather than Dracotail-heavy. Covers the branded-dracotail-opener-mirrorjade-line fixture variant.

goals.name: Arthalion + Secreterion (2-Fusion core)
goals.description: Core 2-Fusion endboard when only one fusion engine completes. Arthalion quick-removal + Secreterion GY-recycle engine provides durable interruption + resource recovery.

goals.name: Any Dracotail Fusion finisher on field
goals.description: Gradient: ANY Dracotail Fusion body (Arthalion, Secreterion, Gulamel, Ketu) or Branded finisher (Mirrorjade, Lubellion) on the field. Signals the Fusion engine fired.

required.note: Arthalion | Secreterion | Gulamel | Ketu | Mirrorjade | Lubellion

goals.name: Ecclesia and the Dark Dragon on field
goals.description: Dark Dragon Synchro body — quick-eff SS from Deck/GY + banish-self protection. Valuable interruption even if other bodies missing.

goals.name: Any Dracotail trap set
goals.description: Gradient: at least one Dracotail trap (Flame/Horn/Sting) set on the backrow.

goals.name: Fallen & Virtuous set
goals.description: Gradient: Branded trap (Fallen & Virtuous) set via Albion EP-effect.

goals.name: Albion milled (EP set armed)
goals.description: Progress signal (Lever 2 2026-04-21): Albion in GY indicates it was sent there from ED this turn (typically via Fallen of White Dragon's hand-eff). Albion's EP-eff will set a Branded Spell/Trap from deck — this state commits the endboard to a Branded trap set.

required.note: Albion the Branded Dragon sent to GY

goals.name: Fallen-of-Albaz substitute reached GY
goals.description: Progress signal: a Fallen of Albaz substitute (White Dragon / Fallen of Albaz) in GY unlocks: (1) Cartesia self-SS condition, (2) Dark Dragon's banish-self effect can target Lv4-or-lower-mentioning-Albaz from GY. Key gate for the Cartesia-Fusion line.

required.note: Fallen of Albaz | Fallen of the White Dragon in GY

goals.name: Fusion spell activated
goals.description: Progress signal: Branded Fusion OR Rahu Dracotail in GY = a Fusion spell was activated this turn. Strong signal that a Fusion monster is already on field (or was, before being material for a subsequent Fusion).

required.note: Branded Fusion | Rahu Dracotail in GY

goals.name: Dracotail Lv4 in GY (on-material fired)
goals.description: Progress signal: a Lv4 Dracotail (Lukias / Phryxul / Sword Ryzeal wait that's Ryzeal / Urgula) in GY likely means it was sent as Fusion material, triggering on-fusion-material Dracotail-S/T-set effects. Captures the 'Fusion engine ran' state before the final endboard stabilizes.

required.note: Lukias | Phryxul | Urgula | Mululu in GY

routes.name: Fallen of White Dragon hand-eff → mill Albion → SS self

steps.note: Fallen of White Dragon hand-eff: send Albion from ED to GY (mentions Fallen of Albaz); SS self. ED-locks into Lv8 Fusion/Synchro rest of turn.
White Dragon on-SS trigger: SS Incredible Ecclesia from Deck (mentions Fallen of Albaz)
Synchro Summon Ecclesia and the Dark Dragon (Lv8) using Incredible Ecclesia (Tuner Lv4) + Fallen of White Dragon (Lv4 non-Tuner)

routes.name: Dark Dragon Quick-eff: banish self + SS Ecclesia from GY

steps.note: Dark Dragon Quick-eff: banish self until EP, SS 1 Fallen of Albaz or Lv4-or-lower mentioning it from Deck/GY. Target Incredible Ecclesia from GY.
Re-SS Incredible Ecclesia from GY
Cartesia self-SS from hand (Fallen of White Dragon in GY is treated as Fallen of Albaz, satisfies condition)
NS Dracotail Lukias (Lv4 Spellcaster); triggers on-NS: search 1 Dracotail monster
Lukias on-NS trigger: add Dracotail Urgula to hand (key Fusion material for Secreterion)
Cartesia Quick-eff: Fusion Summon Lv8+ Fusion from ED using hand/field
Fusion Summon Secreterion Dragon (1 Dragon + 1 Spellcaster). Urgula (hand Dragon) + Lukias (field Spellcaster). Both → GY triggering on-material sets.
Lukias on-fusion-material: set Dracotail Flame from deck
Urgula on-fusion-material: set Rahu Dracotail from deck (for step 9 Fusion summon)

routes.name: Urgula GY → recycle Lukias to hand

steps.note: Urgula GY-eff: target 1 Spellcaster Dracotail in GY; place Urgula on deck-bottom; add target to hand. Target = Lukias.
Lukias returned to hand (from Urgula GY-eff resolution)

routes.name: Rahu Dracotail → Fusion Arthalion (Lukias hand + Mululu deck)

steps.note: Activate Rahu Dracotail (Normal Spell, legal same-turn-as-set). Fusion-summon from ED using hand/deck/field.
Fusion Summon Arthalion (Lv8 Fusion Dragon). Materials: Lukias from hand (satisfies '1+ from hand' clause) + Mululu from deck.
Arthalion on-Fusion-Summon trigger: target monster on field/GY up to # materials from hand; return Fallen of White Dragon (in GY) to hand.
Mululu on-fusion-material trigger: set Dracotail Horn from deck
Secreterion GY-eff (active after being GY'd OR as quick-eff from field): target 1 Dragon + 1 Spellcaster in GY; SS 1, deck-bottom the other. Pick Mululu (Dragon) SS; Lukias (Spellcaster) to deck.
SS Mululu from GY
Albion EP-eff (if in GY because sent this turn): add or set Branded S/T from Deck. Set The Fallen & The Virtuous.
Activate Branded Fusion. ED-locks into Fusion summons rest of turn.
Fusion Summon Mirrorjade the Iceblade Dragon (mentions Fallen of Albaz). Materials from hand/deck/field.

routes.name: Blazing Cartesia self-SS (Fallen of Albaz in GY)

steps.note: Cartesia self-SS from hand — requires 'Fallen of Albaz' (or a treated-as substitute, e.g., Fallen of White Dragon) on field or in GY.

synergies.effect: Fallen of White Dragon → SS Incredible Ecclesia (Tuner Lv4) from deck → Synchro Dark Dragon (Lv8). The core Branded-Dracotail opener: 1 hand card produces Lv8 Synchro + triggers ED-lock allowing Lv8 Fusion follow-ups (Secreterion, Arthalion).

Dark Dragon Quick-eff brings Incredible Ecclesia back from GY while banishing itself — Ecclesia re-SS enables Cartesia (Fallen of Albaz condition met by White Dragon in GY) + creates 2 more Lv4 bodies for future Xyz/Fusion.
Lukias NS searches Urgula → Cartesia Fusion uses Urgula+Lukias → Secreterion on field + both on-material triggers set 2 Dracotail traps + Urgula GY-eff recycles Lukias to hand.

Rahu Dracotail Fusion spell lets Arthalion pull Mululu from DECK while satisfying '1+ from hand' via Lukias (recycled earlier). Arthalion on-Fusion returns Fallen of White Dragon to hand + triggers Mululu on-material set.

Secreterion GY-eff (quick-eff from field: target 1 Dragon + 1 Spellcaster in GY; SS 1, shuffle other back). Re-SS Mululu (Dragon) from GY + shuffle Lukias (Spellcaster) back to deck for future Dracotail re-search.
Albion the Branded Dragon's EP-eff (triggered when sent to GY this turn) sets a Branded Spell/Trap from deck. Primary target: The Fallen & The Virtuous — the key Branded trap endboard piece.

Fallen of Albaz (and substitutes like Fallen of the White Dragon) in GY/field is the ACTIVATION CONDITION for Cartesia's self-SS. This is the critical bridge between Branded engine (GY setup) and Dracotail engine (Cartesia Fusion).

Mirrorjade-line alternative: Branded Fusion tutors Mirrorjade or Lubellion via Fallen-of-Albaz-material clause. Pivots endboard away from Dracotail engine if Dracotail starters absent. Secondary target for decks without Lukias/Ecclesia-Dark-Dragon access.

Faimena (Quick Fusion via hand discard) is a DIFFERENT route to Fusion summons — usable without Cartesia. Generally held for T2 in the canonical line, but could be primary Fusion if Cartesia isn't accessible. OPT per effect.

sourceNotes: v1 (2026-04-21) — derived from _bmad-output/solver-data/branded-dracotail-combo-plan-2026-04-19.md (user-dictated 12-step canonical line). 36 cards mapped covering Branded+Despia+Dogmatika+Dracotail. 8 goals: canonical-full (7-piece endboard), 4MZONE-partial, Mirrorjade-alt, Arthalion+Secreterion duo, any-fusion-partial, dark-dragon-body, dracotail-trap-set, branded-trap-set. 10 routes capturing each Phase of the combo plan (Fallen-mill, Synchro, Dark-Dragon-banish, Lukias-search, Cartesia-Fusion, Urgula-GY-recycle, Rahu-Fusion-Arthalion, Secreterion-GY-re-SS, Albion-EP-set, Mirrorjade-alt, Cartesia-field-SS). Dogmatika/Despia enablers (Aluber 62962630, Guiding Ariadne 98301564) included in roleMap for completeness though not core to this fixture. Expected combo depth ~40-60 OCG decisions per the source plan — 5/5 matched is ambitious but goal catalogue pushes DFS toward canonical terminal with strong gradient signals.
